content_max_chars.description: Truncate each entry's `content` to the first N characters (a preview). Omit for the full body. Ignored when `keys_only=true`.

date_from.description: ISO-8601 inclusive lower bound on `updated_at`. Omit to skip the lower bound.

date_to.description: ISO-8601 exclusive upper bound on `updated_at`. Pass to walk back past the result cap on subsequent calls (cursor-style: set to the `updated_at` of the oldest entry from the prior page).

keys_only.description: When true, blank each entry's `content` and return only keys + metadata. Use to scan which memories exist without pulling their (potentially large) bodies, then re-query the ones worth a full read. Takes precedence over `content_max_chars`.

limit.description: Max rows to return (default 20, hard cap 500).

text.description: ILIKE substring match against `content`. Omit to return the most recent entries.
